## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into BaseTen's product positioning, performance metrics, and key differentiators to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [BaseTen offers three core products: Dedicated Deployments, Model APIs, and Training, all optimized for mission-critical inference](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Key differentiators: superior performance (latency/throughput), high reliability (4 nines uptime), cost efficiency, and transparent developer experience](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [BaseTen Inference Stack combines model runtime optimizations and inference-optimized infrastructure for best-in-class performance](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [Content strategy should emphasize technical expertise while maintaining a relatable, humble tone, leveraging customer examples](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)

## Topics

### BaseTen Product Overview

  - [Three main products serving the inference lifecycle:](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Dedicated Deployments: Custom GPU deployments with full control](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Model APIs: Pre-optimized, popular LLMs for quick testing and early-stage use](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Training: Infrastructure-focused for engineers, enabling multi-node training](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Key Pillars and Differentiators

  - [Four pillars: Forward-deployed engineers, Developer experience, Model performance, Infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Three main differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Performance: Consistently lower latency (30-70%) and higher throughput than competitors](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Reliability: 4 nines uptime powered by multi-cloud capacity management (MCM)](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
      - [Cost efficiency: Optimized resource usage leading to significant cost savings](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### BaseTen Inference Stack

  - [Combines model runtime optimizations and inference-optimized infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [Model runtime: Includes modality-specific runtimes, custom kernels, speculation engines](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [Infrastructure: Handles routing, networking, auto-scaling, and multi-cloud management](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)

### Modality-Specific Optimizations

  - [Embeddings: 2x higher throughput, 10% lower latency, smallest memory footprint](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
  - [Transcription: 1000x real-time factor, lowest word error rate](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=2999.0)
  - [BaseTen Chains: Enables efficient compound AI workflows with independent scaling](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3073.0)

### Deployment Options

  - [BaseTen Cloud: Default option and single-tenant deployments](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3195.0)
  - [Self-hosted: Includes hybrid option for spillover to BaseTen Cloud](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3195.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Aim for a knowledgeable yet humble tone, avoiding a "teacher" persona](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)
  - [Emphasize strong technical arguments while remaining relatable to developers](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)
  - [Focus on showing rather than telling, leveraging customer examples and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3328.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to review and provide feedback on content strategy and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3421.0)
  - [Rachel to share thoughts on content in the Cosex channel](https://fathom.video/share/ki2YTh-QKxzysyC8Uz4Q4TgmgaJAvyM7?tab=summary&timestamp=3469.0)
